name: Category: 2010 Top 25 - Risky Resource Management
description: This is a Category grouping weaknesses from the 'Risky Resource Management' section of the 2010 CWE/SANS Top 25. Includes CWE-22, CWE-98, CWE-120, CWE-129, CWE-131, CWE-190, CWE-494, CWE-754, CWE-770, CWE-805. Prohibited for vulnerability mapping.
